summary: Reusable Tavern UI surfaces for Yggdrasil-hosted YdlTavern. Project-local descriptor; intentionally does not claim final Yggdrasil surface loader semantics.

stylesheets.note: All design tokens are scoped under .ydltavern-surface; the package never assigns to :root.

fonts.note: Fonts are NOT bundled. Hosts should load them at the page/app level. Fallback chains render acceptably without.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Play
surfaces.description: Contract-backed thin slice: live ST context runtime, Turn list projected from mirrored store snapshot, send / generate / edit wired, event diagnostics, prompt-critical & world-info diagnostics, and slash diagnostics.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Settings
surfaces.description: Settings surface placeholder. Scaffold only — no settings schema, no persistence wiring.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Extensions
surfaces.description: Extensions surface placeholder. Scaffold only — no loader, no registry, no install flow.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Characters
surfaces.description: Character library surface mirroring the Characters drawer: search, group-chat hint, create/import/edit/duplicate/export/delete affordances.

surfaces.title: Tavern · World Info
surfaces.description: World book surface mirroring the World Info drawer: book list, entry editor, and activation diagnostics.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Persona
surfaces.description: Persona surface mirroring the Persona drawer: multi-persona list, edit form, and settings toggles.

surfaces.title: Tavern · AI Response Configuration
surfaces.description: Sampler and generation configuration surface mirroring the AI Config drawer: presets, sampler matrix, banned tokens, logit bias, and streaming controls.

surfaces.title: Tavern · User Settings
surfaces.description: User preference surface mirroring the User Settings drawer: theme picker, UI preferences, font scale, chat width, and persisted settings.

surfaces.title: Tavern · Backgrounds
surfaces.description: Background browser surface mirroring the Backgrounds drawer: image browser, folders, search, fit mode, and auto-select controls.

fixtures.purpose: demo + test fixture exercising every Turn sub-message kind the renderer handles

notes: This descriptor is project-local and intentionally does not claim final Yggdrasil surface loader semantics.
Surfaces are pure React components — hosts may embed them directly or wire them through a Yggdrasil surface registry once one exists.
YdlTavern owns Tavern UI surfaces, not the desktop/web/app shell. There is no main.tsx, no router, no Tauri config in this package.

ydltavern/play is a contract-backed thin slice: it consumes createSTContext, addOneMessage, Generate, proxy edits, eventSource dispatch, prompt-critical blocks, world-info evaluation, slash diagnostics, and then projects the resulting Turn list live.
